user_story: As an HR admin, I want to enable support for attendance audit, so that the organization can run periodic attendance audits
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Audit Configuration Settings screen; When I set "Do you support attendance audit?" to Yes and Save; Then attendance audit is enabled

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to choose the method for selecting sample data (e.g. Random), so that audit samples are drawn consistently
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Audit Configuration Settings screen; When I select a method for selection of sample data; Then the chosen sampling method is saved

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to automatically include habitual violators in each audit, so that repeat offenders are always reviewed
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Audit Configuration Settings screen; When I enable "Automatically include habitual violators in each audit?" and Save; Then habitual violators are included in every audit

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to set the history period and minimum number of reprimands considered, so that habitual violators are identified using clear thresholds
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Audit Configuration Settings screen; When I enter the consider history months and minimum number of reprimands and Save; Then the thresholds are applied to violator identification

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to limit how many times a user can reschedule an audit and when the employee list can be generated, so that audits run within controlled timeframes
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Audit Configuration Settings screen; When I set the reschedule limit and the minutes before scheduled audit time for list generation and Save; Then these rules govern audit scheduling

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to cancel changes to audit configuration, so that I can discard edits I do not want to keep
acceptance_criteria: Given I have made changes on the Audit Configuration Settings screen; When I click Cancel; Then my unsaved changes are discarded
